title: Monday AI Assistant with Real Power
excerpt: Hey there! My team has been playing around with the idea of an AI chat tool within monday that will allow you to create and update things in monday like workspaces, boards, groups, items, subitems and updates. It’s super…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! My team has been playing around with the idea of an AI chat tool within monday that will allow you to create and update things in monday like workspaces, boards, groups, items, subitems and updates. It’s super new, but you can see a 10 sec video preview here.

We’re super excited about this. If you are interested in playing with a prototype of a tool like this, and using it in it’s early stages. Let us know here.

posts.author: doronbl (Doron Bleiberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Take a look on my genesix Work agentic chat for automating monday.com tasks. You can start for free without credit card. Would love to hear your feedback.
Start here:
https://work.genesix.app/
